name: Team Up VR (Beta)
short_description: Immerse yourself in the world of ultimate war between Terminators and Humans. Choose your hero from different playable characters. Fight and claim your victory in an epic VR death match.
detailed_description:
Team Up is a virtual reality enabled multiplayer sci-fi shooter game where 6 players are pitted against one another in a 3 vs. 3 match.
Immerse yourself in the world of ultimate war between Terminators and Humans. Choose your hero from different playable characters. Fight and claim your victory in an epic VR death match.

Features

  • Dedicated Servers
  • Bots
  • Death match
  • 10 Heroes with different weapons and abilities
  • Touch-pad locomotion
  • Runs on Vive, Oculus and WMR
  • Different maps with different objectives (Soon)
  • Offline Mode (Soon)
  • Voice Chat (Soon)
